description_long: This is a visually striking shotgun with a predominantly glossy red finish, accented by white graphic patterns and a few black and silver components. The body is streamlined and angular, with a long, cylindrical barrel and a rectangular receiver area. The stock features a full, straight design with a white web-like motif on both sides, and the grip is black with a silver base. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The shotgun lacks visible external mechanisms such as a pump or lever, suggesting a simple action design. Decorative elements, such as a central red square with a white 'X', add a modern, stylized touch to the weapon.
description: A glossy red, stylized shotgun with white graphic accents, a full stock, and a black grip, featuring a streamlined, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, with the white web pattern on the stock, black grip, and red receiver with a central decorative square.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical, narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, mirroring the left with the web pattern and decorative elements, but with the grip and trigger more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the overall width, with the web pattern and grip base visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
